title: ROLE OF PLATFORM TECHNOLOGIES AND AI/ML IN ADVANCING PHARMACEUTICAL MANUFACTURING
description: The pharmaceutical (pharma) manufacturing sector is rapidly evolving to meet the global needs for faster, safer, and more efficient therapeutics.
text:
Kumar, V. and Srinivasan, V. (2025), ROLE OF PLATFORM TECHNOLOGIES AND AI/ML IN ADVANCING PHARMACEUTICAL MANUFACTURING, Proceedings of the ASME 2025 International Design Engineering Technical Conferences and Computers and Information in Engineering Conference, Anaheim, CA, US (Accessed March 1, 2026)
